flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at National University rose 45% between 2007 and 2010 ($5.5k → $8.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at National University fell 21% between 2007 and 2010 (100.0% → 78.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at National University rose 14% between 2007 and 2010 ($9.7k → $11.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at National University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
